title: Sensei's FPS Boost
description: So by using this modpack , you will be getting more fps !!
body:
Boost your Minecraft performance to the next level!
This modpack is carefully optimized to deliver maximum FPS, minimal lag, and smooth gameplay — without changing the vanilla feel.

Perfect for low-end and high-end PCs alike, it includes only performance-focused mods like Sodium, Lithium, and Starlight, all fine-tuned for stability and speed.

Whether you’re PvPing, exploring, or building massive worlds — enjoy ultra-smooth frames and fast load times with this lightweight FPS-boost modpack.

⚙️ Key Features

🚀 Massive FPS boost (2x–5x depending on system)

🧠 Smart optimization without affecting visuals

💾 Lightweight and stable — zero bloat mods

**🧩 Compatible with most Fabric mods**
